prompt: A dark, moody anime-style illustration of a slim young man lying flat on a shadowy floor, shown from above in a vertical composition. He has messy short white hair and a pale body, with his face mostly obscured by shadow and cropped ambiguity, creating an eerie, poetic atmosphere. His white button-up shirt is soaked, wrinkled, and hanging fully open, exposing his chest and abdomen. Thin streams of blood run down from his neck across his torso and lower body, stylized rather than gory. Count exactly 10 sewing pins stuck through the fabric and around his body: 2 near the left shoulder and upper sleeve, 2 on the left lower side near the waist and forearm, 3 on the right chest and shoulder area, 1 on the right mid torso, and 2 near the lower right hem. Place 1 overturned wine glass in the upper left corner with red wine spilled beside it. Place 1 white butterfly resting gently on his lower abdomen. Add diagonal bands of rainbow prism light crossing the dark floor and parts of his body, with cinematic high contrast, soft painterly shading, delicate linework, and melancholic symbolic storytelling. The overall mood should be tragic, beautiful, ethereal, and unsettling, like a dramatic key visual from a psychological anime.
